---
title: 'Fiction Declaration'
date: '2014-02-17T13:21:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7605341359677162385'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/fiction-declaration.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Decisions'
---

I'm going to write a novel and get published. I'm going to do it because writing a novel is a worthwhile endeavour and because I have something important to say to the world. I refuse to let anything get in my way!<br />
02/14/2014<br />
Writing Fiction for Dummies
